sections.sectionTitle: Lungsim Tak Tawh An Tan'lohna Kitai

verses.text: Kumpi Darias in a uk a kum lina, a kha kuana Khislev kha a ni li ni-in Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen hi

Bethel khuamite in, Topa' tung panin thupha a ngen ding, leh Vanglian Topa' biakinn sunga a om siampite leh kamsangte tungah, “A beisa kum tampi sung ka hihsa uh mah bangin biakinn siatna hangin kapkap lai-in, kha ngana sungin an na tangtanglai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong dingin Sharezer leh Regemmelek, leh a mite uh na sawl uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a
“Gamsung mi khempeuh leh siampite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in a beisa kum sawmsagih sung kha ngana leh kha sagihna sungin an tangin a kahna uh, kei hong pahtawina uh hilo hi
A annek a tuidawnte uh zong, amau' duh man bek ahi hi,” hong ci hi

Jerusalem cithei-in a khuasungah mi tampi om a, leitaw lam gam, nitumna lam gam, a kiim a pam khuapite-ah mi tampi tengin a om hun laitakin, tu-a bangmahin Topa in a kamsang masate' tung tawnin a gensa thu ahi hi.
Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen a
“Note in thu a tangin khenin, khatlekhat tungah itna leh hehpihna kilakin
note lakah a om meigong, tagah, gamdang mite, ahih kei leh mizawngte gim pialoin, khatlekhat kiliatsakna ding na ngaihsut lohna ding uh thu ka hong piazo hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin amaute in mang nuam hetlo uh a, hih thute ngaihsutin zong nei nuamlo uh hi
Amaute in a lungsim uh suangtum bangin sak sak uh a, Vanglian Topa in tanglai kamsangte' tung tawnin a gen thuhilhnate ngai nuamlo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa heh mahmah hi
Amaute ka hopih ciangin hong ngai nuamlo uh hi; kei zong amaute' hong thungetna ka ngai kei ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi

Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Huihpi' mutkhiat bangin amaute thehthang gawpin, a theihngei nailohna uh gamdangah amaute teng ding uh hi. Amau' nusiat leitang hoih zong gamkhing suak ding a, a tungah kuamah om nawnloin daicip ding hi,” a ci hi.
